title: ARI science_data.json — Research Contract claim layer
description: Story2Proposal integration Phase A. The claims[] / numeric_assertions[] layer added on top of science_data.json (produced by ari-skill-transform's nodes_to_science_data). claims ground on the deterministic part of science_data (results.json measurements/scores or node metrics) and carry real node_id + metric_path operands. supported_by.figures starts empty and is late-bound by the paper post-processor (paper_claim_links). The deterministic hard gate (ari-core) re-verifies numeric_assertions.

_config_nodes.description: Internal (underscore) resolution map for Story2Proposal (c) forward declaration: stable config handle (cfgN) -> {node_id, environment, metrics[]}. Lets the writer DECLARE assertions referencing configs (% CLAIM:Cx:NCx metric=.. formula=.. baseline=cfgN proposed=cfgM) and lets the hard gate resolve cfgN -> node_id WITHOUT exposing node_id in the paper-facing configurations. Not part of the paper-facing science surface.

metrics.description: metric_key -> recorded value (so the writer can pick the key whose value matches its stated number); a key-only array is accepted for back-compat.

numeric_assertions.description: Flattened view of every claim's numeric_assertions, each with a claim_id back-reference, so the hard gate can iterate a flat list.

metric_path.description: Dot-path resolved against results.json (measurements.* / scores.* / params.*) or node metrics (metrics.*).

environment.description: Execution-environment provenance of this operand's node (from node_report). Transparency for cross-environment comparisons.

id.description: Stable id (NCx). Used in the % CLAIM:Cx:NCx anchor.

operands.description: Role -> operand. identity uses {value}; comparison formulas use {baseline, proposed}.

cross_environment.description: True iff the comparison operands span different execution environments (provenance flag; the hard gate's environment_mismatch severity is intent-driven via comparison_scope).

aggregation.description: MVP: recorded only. True trial aggregation requires per-trial raw values (future scope).

id.description: Stable id (Cx). Used in the % CLAIM:Cx:NCx anchor.

text.description: Templated seed prose; finalized by the paper writer.

figures.description: figures_manifest figure ids; empty at draft, late-bound by paper post-processor.
